<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Analyzing safe area layout**

I found that the app has double safe area handling with nested SafeAreaViews causing potential layout issues. I discovered the app bar is outside the navigator, causing HomeScreen's top SafeAreaView to add redundant inset. The HomeScreen's top SafeAreaView applies inset even though the app bar already consumes the top safe area, creating redundant spacing. I'm adjusting the HomeScreen to prevent redundant top spacing by ensuring the app bar handles the safe area inset properly. 

**Fixing safe area insets**

I'm correcting the double application of top safe area insets by preventing HomeScreen's SafeAreaView from adding the full status bar height again. I identified that SafeAreaView duplicates</details></think>
